umidi
  • API Reference
  • Template Class BootloaderInterface
  • View page source

Template Class BootloaderInterface

  • Defined in File umi_bootloader.hh

Class Documentation

template<const PlatformConfig *Config>
class BootloaderInterface

Bootloader controller Manages A/B partition switching and boot configuration.

Public Functions

inline void init(const FlashInterface &flash) noexcept

Initialize with flash interface.

inline bool load_config() noexcept

Load boot configuration from flash.

inline bool save_config() noexcept

Save boot configuration to flash.

inline Slot active_slot() const noexcept

Get active slot.

inline Slot inactive_slot() const noexcept

Get inactive slot.

inline SlotState slot_state(Slot slot) const noexcept

Get slot state.

inline const FlashRegion &slot_region(Slot slot) const noexcept

Get slot flash region.

inline Slot update_target() const noexcept

Get update target slot (inactive slot)

inline uint32_t update_target_address() const noexcept

Get update target address.

inline uint32_t max_firmware_size() const noexcept

Get maximum firmware size.

inline FlashResult prepare_slot(Slot slot) noexcept

Prepare slot for writing (erase)

inline FlashResult write_firmware(Slot slot, uint32_t offset, const uint8_t *data, size_t size) noexcept

Write firmware data to slot.

inline void mark_slot_valid(Slot slot, uint32_t version, uint32_t crc) noexcept

Mark slot as valid after successful verification.

inline void mark_slot_pending(Slot slot) noexcept

Set slot as pending (update received but not committed)

inline bool commit_update() noexcept

Commit update (switch active slot)

inline bool mark_boot_successful() noexcept

Mark current boot as successful Call this from application after successful startup.

inline bool increment_boot_count() noexcept

Increment boot count (called by bootloader on each boot)

inline bool rollback() noexcept

Manual rollback to previous slot.

inline bool rollback_available() const noexcept

Check if rollback is available.

inline const BootConfig &config() const noexcept

Get boot configuration (read-only)

Public Static Functions

static inline const PlatformConfig &platform() noexcept

Get platform configuration.
